login.title: Sign In
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.lockoutMessage: Too many failed attempts. Please try again after {minutes} minutes.

register.title: Create Account
register.registrationSuccess: Your account has been created successfully!
register.verifyEmail: Please verify your email address. We sent a verification link to {email}.
register.verifyPhone: Please verify your phone number. We sent a code to {phone}.
register.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

passwordReset.enterEmail: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
passwordReset.resetLinkSent: A password reset link has been sent to {email}.
passwordReset.passwordChanged: Your password has been changed successfully.
passwordReset.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

otp.otpSent: We sent a verification code to {destination}.
otp.otpExpired: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
otp.invalidOtp: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
